name: Notion
description: Notion is a collaboration and productivity tool.

name: Atlassian
description: Collaboration software for software, IT and business teams.

name: Sentry
description: Sentry is a developer-first error tracking and performance monitoring platform.

name: Neon
description: Neon is a fully managed serverless PostgreSQL.

name: Fireflies
description: Fireflies is an AI meeting assistant

name: Otter
description: Otter.ai is an AI-powered assistant that generates rich notes from meetings.

name: PagerDuty
description: PagerDuty is an incident management platform.

name: Github
description: GitHub is a code hosting platform for version control and collaboration.

name: Linear
description: Linear is a streamlined project and issue tracking tool for software teams.

name: Hugging Face
description: Hugging Face is a platform for machine learning models, datasets, and AI tools.

name: Honeycomb
description: Honeycomb is an observability platform for understanding production systems.

name: Paypal
description: PayPal is a global online payment platform letting users securely send/receive money, shop, and manage finances.

name: Box
description: Box is a cloud content management platform letting users securely store, share, and collaborate on files and documents.

name: Asana
description: Asana is a cloud-based work management platform that helps teams organize, track, and manage their projects and daily tasks in one place, allowing for better collaboration, clarity on responsibilities (who's doing what by when), and streamlined workflows through features like task lists, boards, timelines, and automation.

name: Pendo
description: Pendo is a product analytics and user guidance platform letting product teams understand user behavior, guide users through features, and gather feedback to improve product adoption and user experience.

name: HubSpot
description: HubSpot is a customer platform that unifies marketing, sales, service, content, and commerce tools around a single CRM.

name: Common Room
description: Common Room is a platform that captures buying signals from product usage, community activity, and third-party sources, then uses enrichment and automation to help sales and marketing teams know who to contact, when to reach out, and what to say.

name: Calendly
description: Enhance your business productivity and automate your scheduling workflows with Calendly's MCP server.

name: Buildkite
description: Buildkite is a continuous integration and deployment platform.

name: Miro
description: Miro is an infinite canvas loaded with tools designed for creative brainstorming and collaboration.

name: Postman
description: Postman is an API platform that unifies API design, testing, documentation, and monitoring in one place.

name: Mixpanel
description: Mixpanel is a digital analytics platform that helps teams continuously improve their products by turning data into action.

name: Craft
description: Craft is a docs and notes editor that helps teams create, organize, and collaborate on documents.

name: Attio
description: Attio is a modern, AI-native Customer Relationship Management (CRM) platform designed for sales and go-to-market (GTM) teams, particularly fast-growing startups and scale-ups.

name: Netlify
description: Netlify is a platform where teams can create with AI or code and deploy instantly on production infrastructure.

name: Context7
description: Context7 is an open-source MCP server by Upstash that provides up-to-date, version-specific library documentation for AI coding assistants.
